modules.name: ESP32-C6-MINI-1

module_variant_details.name: ESP32-C6-MINI-1
module_variant_details.flash: 4 MB SPI flash in chip package
module_variant_details.pinout_impact: Same 53-pad module pinout as MINI-1U; antenna implementation differs.

peripheral_notes.summary: Documented module pads with native USB data functions.
Documented module pads with UART0 data functions; reserve them when serial flashing or boot logs are required.

general_warnings: Module-level guidance only: this does not identify a carrier board or guarantee that a header pin is unused.
A carrier board can connect exposed GPIOs to LEDs, USB bridges, buttons, power circuitry, or other peripherals.
This profile is the 53-pad ESP32-C6-MINI-1 module layout, not the bare ESP32-C6 QFN package.
ESP32-C6-MINI-1 uses the on-board PCB antenna variant; the related MINI-1U uses an external antenna connector.

sources.title: ESP32-C6-MINI-1 & ESP32-C6-MINI-1U Datasheet
sections: Figure 10-3 Dimensions of External Antenna Connector
Figure 11-1 ESP32-C6-MINI-1 Recommended PCB Land Pattern
Figure 11-2 ESP32-C6-MINI-1U Recommended PCB Land Pattern

modules.name: ESP32-C6-MINI-1U

module_variant_details.name: ESP32-C6-MINI-1U
module_variant_details.flash: 4 MB SPI flash in chip package
module_variant_details.pinout_impact: Same 53-pad module pinout as MINI-1; antenna connector changes RF layout only.

peripheral_notes.summary: Documented module pads with native USB data functions.
Documented module pads with UART0 data functions; reserve them when serial flashing or boot logs are required.

general_warnings: Module-level guidance only: this does not identify a carrier board or guarantee that a header pin is unused.
A carrier board can connect exposed GPIOs to LEDs, USB bridges, buttons, power circuitry, or other peripherals.
This profile is the 53-pad ESP32-C6-MINI-1U module layout, not the bare ESP32-C6 QFN package.
ESP32-C6-MINI-1U uses an external antenna connector and has no keepout zone; the pad pinout matches ESP32-C6-MINI-1.

sources.title: ESP32-C6-MINI-1 & ESP32-C6-MINI-1U Datasheet
sections: Figure 10-3 Dimensions of External Antenna Connector

modules.name: ESP32-C3-MINI-1

module_variant_details.name: ESP32-C3-MINI-1
module_variant_details.flash: 4 MB or 8 MB Quad SPI flash in the chip package, depending on module variant
module_variant_details.pinout_impact: Same 53-pad module pinout as MINI-1U; antenna implementation and module length differ.

peripheral_notes.summary: Documented module pads with native USB data functions.
Documented module pads with UART0 data functions; reserve them when serial flashing or boot logs are required.

general_warnings: Module-level guidance only: this does not identify a carrier board or guarantee that a header pin is unused.
A carrier board can connect exposed GPIOs to LEDs, USB bridges, buttons, power circuitry, or other peripherals.
This profile is the 53-pad ESP32-C3-MINI-1 module layout, not the bare ESP32-C3 QFN package.
ESP32-C3-MINI-1 uses an on-board PCB antenna; the related MINI-1U uses an external antenna connector with the same pad pinout.

modules.name: ESP32-C3-MINI-1U

module_variant_details.name: ESP32-C3-MINI-1U
module_variant_details.flash: 4 MB Quad SPI flash in the chip package
module_variant_details.pinout_impact: Same 53-pad module pinout as MINI-1; antenna connector changes the RF layout only.

peripheral_notes.summary: Documented module pads with native USB data functions.
Documented module pads with UART0 data functions; reserve them when serial flashing or boot logs are required.

general_warnings: Module-level guidance only: this does not identify a carrier board or guarantee that a header pin is unused.
A carrier board can connect exposed GPIOs to LEDs, USB bridges, buttons, power circuitry, or other peripherals.
This profile is the 53-pad ESP32-C3-MINI-1U module layout, not the bare ESP32-C3 QFN package.
ESP32-C3-MINI-1U uses an external antenna connector and has no PCB-antenna keepout zone; its pad pinout matches ESP32-C3-MINI-1.

module_variant_details.flash: 4 MB or 8 MB external Quad SPI flash, depending on module variant
module_variant_details.pinout_impact: Same 19-pad module pinout as WROOM-02U; antenna implementation and module length differ.

peripheral_notes.summary: Documented module pads with native USB data functions.
Documented module pads with UART0 data functions; reserve them when serial flashing or boot logs are required.

general_warnings: Module-level guidance only: this does not identify a carrier board or guarantee that a header pin is unused.
A carrier board can connect exposed GPIOs to LEDs, USB bridges, buttons, power circuitry, or other peripherals.
This profile is the 19-pad ESP32-C3-WROOM-02 module layout, not the bare ESP32-C3 QFN package.
ESP32-C3-WROOM-02 uses an on-board PCB antenna; the related WROOM-02U uses an external antenna connector with the same pad pinout.

modules.name: ESP32-C3-WROOM-02U

module_variant_details.name: ESP32-C3-WROOM-02U
module_variant_details.flash: 4 MB or 8 MB external Quad SPI flash, depending on module variant
module_variant_details.pinout_impact: Same 19-pad module pinout as WROOM-02; antenna connector changes the RF layout only.

peripheral_notes.summary: Documented module pads with native USB data functions.
Documented module pads with UART0 data functions; reserve them when serial flashing or boot logs are required.

general_warnings: Module-level guidance only: this does not identify a carrier board or guarantee that a header pin is unused.
A carrier board can connect exposed GPIOs to LEDs, USB bridges, buttons, power circuitry, or other peripherals.
This profile is the 19-pad ESP32-C3-WROOM-02U module layout, not the bare ESP32-C3 QFN package.
ESP32-C3-WROOM-02U uses an external antenna connector and has no PCB-antenna keepout zone; its pad pinout matches ESP32-C3-WROOM-02.

modules.name: ESP-WROOM-02D

module_variant_details.name: ESP-WROOM-02D
module_variant_details.flash: 2 MB / 4 MB / 16 MB SPI flash ordering options
module_variant_details.pinout_impact: Same 19-pad module pinout as ESP-WROOM-02U; antenna implementation and module length differ.

peripheral_notes.summary: Documented module pads with UART0 data functions; reserve them when serial flashing or boot logs are required.

general_warnings: Module-level guidance only: this does not identify a carrier board or guarantee that a header pin is unused.
A carrier board can connect exposed GPIOs to LEDs, USB bridges, buttons, power circuitry, or other peripherals.
This profile is the 19-pad ESP-WROOM-02D module layout, not the bare ESP8266EX QFN package.
ESP-WROOM-02D uses a PCB antenna; the related ESP-WROOM-02U uses an external antenna connector with the same pad pinout.

modules.name: ESP-WROOM-02U

module_variant_details.name: ESP-WROOM-02U
module_variant_details.flash: 2 MB / 4 MB / 16 MB SPI flash ordering options
module_variant_details.pinout_impact: Same 19-pad module pinout as ESP-WROOM-02D; antenna connector changes RF layout only.

peripheral_notes.summary: Documented module pads with UART0 data functions; reserve them when serial flashing or boot logs are required.

general_warnings: Module-level guidance only: this does not identify a carrier board or guarantee that a header pin is unused.
A carrier board can connect exposed GPIOs to LEDs, USB bridges, buttons, power circuitry, or other peripherals.
This profile is the 19-pad ESP-WROOM-02U module layout, not the bare ESP8266EX QFN package.
ESP-WROOM-02U uses an external antenna connector and a shorter module body; the pad pinout matches ESP-WROOM-02D.
